runners.spotlight: Zac Purton aboard for his last three races (and when fourth in a recent trial) and was competitive in all of them (6f at Sha Tin); should go well again for all that he's edged up the weights.
runners.comment: Has edged up the weights but looks sure to be competitive again under Zac Purton
runners.owner: Hung Sut Chung Wu Haibo & Ken Hung Kam Lung

runners.name: Amazing Victory
runners.spotlight: Three wins at Sha Tin and his first win here last summer; however, that came out of the blue and he disappointed on his return.
runners.comment: Course win last summer came out of the blue and he was quiet on reappearance

races.name: Glenealy Handicap (Class 3) (Course C+3) (Turf)

runners.name: Violet Star
runners.spotlight: Has yet to be placed after four Hong Kong starts but was denied a clear run when fifth here last time (just ahead of Stormi); considered.
runners.comment: He was denied a clear run when fifth here last time (just ahead of Stormi)

runners.name: Stormi
runners.spotlight: Won three from the front after cheekpieces were fitted in January, all over C&D; however, he shot up the weights as a result and was only sixth last time.
runners.comment: Shot up the weights after his hat-trick here and was only sixth last time

runners.name: Natural Numbers
runners.spotlight: Huge odds when third over Sha Tin's 1m in February but not so good since and he has a wide draw to deal with; fourth of six in a recent trial.
runners.comment: Huge odds when third over Sha Tin's 1m in February but not so good since

runners.name: Noisy Boy
runners.spotlight: Was looking regressive but ran his best race for ages when a closing sixth at Sha Tin last week (1m); has dropped to a good mark.
runners.comment: Ran his best race for ages when a closing sixth at Sha Tin last week (1m)

runners.name: Viva Graciousness
runners.spotlight: The season started well with two C&D wins but mixed since and was behind some of today's rivals last time.
runners.comment: The season started well with two C&D wins but mixed since

runners.name: Romantic Gladiator
runners.spotlight: Won twice last year in Britain (7f) but looks as though he'll need more time before coming good in Hong Kong.
runners.comment: Dual British winner; looks as though he'll need more time before coming good in Hong Kong

runners.name: Allcash
runners.spotlight: C&D winner in November when in this first-time headgear and was then third at Sha Tin off a 2lb higher mark than today's; however, has just dropped his guard of late and stall 11 could be troublesome.
runners.comment: C&D winner; has just dropped his guard of late and stall 11 could be troublesome

runners.name: Ghorgan
runners.spotlight: Reserve; successful in Germany and has performed notably on occasions in Hong Kong; has a race in him off this mark.
runners.comment: Reserve; successful in Germany and has performed notably on occasions in Hong Kong

runners.name: Lucky Twin Stars
runners.spotlight: His sole win in Hong Kong came in a Class 4 over 7f at Sha Tin in January; this level has since found him out and he was last in a recent trial.
runners.comment: Has struggled in three Class 3s since winning at a lower level in January

runners.name: Super Unicorn
runners.spotlight: All three wins have been off lower marks and while this return to 1m will help, he looks vulnerable.
runners.comment: All three wins have been off lower marks and he looks vulnerable

runners.name: Sky Vino
runners.spotlight: Never ideally placed when a close sixth on dirt here last time and he's fine on the turf; likeably consistent as well and unlikely to be far away despite career-high mark.
runners.comment: Likeably consistent and unlikely to be far away despite career-high mark.

runners.name: Silvery Breeze
runners.spotlight: 7lb higher than for his C&D win in December but excellent efforts since then, including two runs back in a Class 2 when 4lb out of the weights; got a bit far behind before staying on last time when back off this correct mark; player.
runners.comment: Got a bit far behind before staying on last time when back off this correct mark; player

runners.name: Mission Giant
runners.spotlight: A winner in Australia; makes Hong Kong debut after a string of defeats in trials.
runners.comment: A winner in Australia; makes Hong Kong debut after a string of defeats in trials

races.name: On Lan Handicap (Class 3) (Course C+3) (Turf) (Div I)

runners.name: Cheaha
runners.spotlight: Promising Hong Kong debut here in November but appears to have regressed sharply since then.
runners.comment: Promising Hong Kong debut in November but appears to have regressed sharply since then

runners.name: Spicy Gold
runners.spotlight: All four wins over C&D and kicks off for new yard on a potentially lenient mark; however, hasn't been running well so there are reservations despite a good draw.
runners.comment: All four wins over C&D and kicks off for new yard on a potentially lenient mark

runners.name: Power Koepp
runners.spotlight: Exposed but a multiple winner and has recorded top-four finishes in three of his last four races; another small drop in the weights can only help.
runners.comment: Exposed but a multiple winner and recorded top-four finishes in three of last four races
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Simon Ng Kar Ming

runners.name: Thriving Brothers
runners.spotlight: C&D winner and also successful over 7f at Sha Tin; mostly consistent and can be forgiven his latest blip from a bad draw; each-way claims.
runners.comment: Mostly consistent and can be forgiven his latest blip from a bad draw
runners.owner: Yeung Chun Wang Yeung Ho Wang & Yeung Chung Wang

runners.name: Wonder Kit
runners.spotlight: Back to form the last twice over C&D and wasn't beaten far on either occasion, though had no excuses from a lower draw last time when behind Ace Champion.
runners.comment: Seems back in better form but had no excuses from a lower draw last time
runners.owner: Ian Chan Yau Nam & Cyrus Chan Sing Kit

runners.name: Ace Champion
runners.spotlight: Won his only start in Ireland (5f); remains lightly raced and only narrowly failed to get the job done over C&D four weeks ago; however, he was in stall 1 that day and now breaks from 12.
runners.comment: Near miss here last time, but from stall 1 and now he breaks from stall 12

runners.name: Gummy Gummy
runners.spotlight: Only narrowly failed over Sha Tin's 6f in January and another fair effort next time; has form here as well but his last run needs forgiving.
runners.comment: Last run needs forgiving but had been shaping as though his turn could be near
runners.owner: Alan Kiang Ping Fai & Joyce Lee

runners.name: Spirit Of Peace
runners.spotlight: Has been running well when dropping lucky with the draw and didn't get the breaks last time when behind Ace Champion; stall 8 isn't the end of the world but he'll need everything to drop right.
runners.comment: Has been running well when dropping lucky with the draw; stall 8 not the end of the world
runners.owner: Fong Chung Man Vincent Fong & Lucia Fong So Ching

runners.name: Matzden
runners.spotlight: Reserve; 7f winner in Australia; ran okay at Sha Tin (6f) on first two Hong Kong starts but hasn't offered a lot in his last two races.
runners.comment: Reserve; won in Australia; hasn't built on an encouraging start in Hong Kong

runners.name: Exceed The Limit
runners.spotlight: Won once in New Zealand; signed off there over 1m and 6f looked too sharp on Hong Kong debut.
runners.comment: Signed off in Australia over 1m and 6f looked too sharp on Hong Kong debut

runners.name: Perfect General
runners.spotlight: Already a dual C&D winner this season and was only a length away off 1lb lower in January before being drawn out of contention on his final start; has dropped luckier in that respect now and very much considered.
runners.comment: C&D winner and in form until drawn out of contention on his final start
runners.owner: Mr & Mrs Ringo Ng Yiu Kwok & Quentin Ng Kwan Wai

runners.name: Magnemite
runners.spotlight: Reserve; second then first in two runs in Australia; however, he's been comfortably beaten in all his local trials.
runners.comment: Reserve; did well in Australia but he's been comfortably beaten in all his local trials

runners.name: Celestial Hero
runners.spotlight: At his best when there's a strong pace ahead of him and he's been running respectably this year; he should be closing when it matters but stall 11 doesn't make life easy; new blinkers replace cheekpieces.
runners.comment: He should be closing when it matters but stall 11 doesn't make life easy; tries blinkers
runners.owner: Dr David Chain Chi Woo Bernard Chain S Chiang & C C S Liang

runners.name: King Miles
runners.spotlight: Two C&D wins late last year and now only 2lb higher than for the latest of those having struggled of late; wouldn't be a surprise to see him stage a revival.
runners.comment: Struggled of late but back on a better mark and he likes it around here
runners.owner: Bernie Yim Mei Fung & Yim Man Hay

races.name: On Lan Handicap (Class 3) (Course C+3) (Turf) (Div II)

runners.name: King Of Fighters
runners.spotlight: 15-race maiden but only his second run for this yard when pushing Sight Hermoso close over C&D last month; did well to threaten after starting slowly (not for the first time) and he's 5lb better off with the winner; if breaking on terms from stall 3 he'd have every chance.
runners.comment: Can break slowly but big run last time and chance if getting away on terms

runners.name: Prestige Always
runners.spotlight: Hasn't always had much luck this season and has dropped to an appealing mark; however, he was disappointing behind some of these last time and he's drawn 11.
runners.comment: He was disappointing behind some of these last time and he's drawn 11
runners.owner: Eric Yeung Ting Fung & Angel Wong Sau Kuen

runners.name: Harmony N Blessed
runners.spotlight: Has won a bucketload of races around here at sprint trips and was only 2.5l off the winner over 5f two weeks ago (running on); now 8lb lower than the mark he defied for last win in November.
runners.comment: 8lb lower than the mark he defied for last win in November and ran well last time
runners.owner: Cheung Ming Man Cheung Ying Ho Et Al

runners.name: Wings Of War
runners.spotlight: C&D winner who has been beaten under 3l in all four races since returning from a break; must have each-way claims.
runners.comment: C&D winner who has been beaten under 3l in all four races since returning from a break

runners.name: Meowth
runners.spotlight: Was running well in Class 4s and coped well with the rise in grade when a length third four weeks ago (runner-up Ace Champion contests the previous race); should be involved.
runners.comment: In form and coped well with the rise in grade when a length third four weeks ago

runners.name: Red Sea
runners.spotlight: Won in New Zealand over 6f; still early days in Hong Kong and recent thirds under Zac Purton at Sha Tin (6f) have to bode well; stall 12 less so, however.
runners.comment: Recent thirds under Purton at Sha Tin (6f) have to bode well; stall 12 less so, however.

runners.name: Flying Wrote
runners.spotlight: Held on narrowly from Meowth over C&D three runs back and then runner-up on his promotion to a Class 3; definite chance on all that and stall 11 scuppered him last time; again wider than ideal today but not ruled out.
runners.comment: Bang in form until scuppered by stall 11 last time; box 9 not ideal but has some chance
runners.owner: Simon Tsang Heung Tung & Shirley Tsang Huang Yang

runners.name: Flying Hunter
runners.spotlight: Won in Australia but hasn't been pulling up any trees in his local trials; likely best watched.
runners.comment: Won in Australia but hasn't been pulling up any trees in local trials; likely best watched

runners.name: Vulcanus
runners.spotlight: Class 4 winner on dirt in January but he's been finding it a struggle at this level.
runners.comment: Class 4 winner on dirt in January but he's been finding it a struggle at this level

runners.name: Matters Most
runners.spotlight: Reserve; capable on his day but inconsistent and all his best Hong Kong form has been at Sha Tin.
runners.comment: Reserve; capable on his day but inconsistent; best Hong Kong form has been at Sha Tin

runners.name: Sight Hermoso
runners.spotlight: Consistent over 5f and has raised his game again over 6f the last twice, doing well to overcome stall 9 here four weeks ago (beat King Of Fighters); has gone up 7lb for that but he's looking progressive, that's if turning a blind eye to a recent trial defeat.
runners.comment: 7lb higher than last time but he's looking progressive over this new distance
runners.owner: Alvin Tam Chi Fung & Dr Andy Poon Tsz Chung

runners.name: Super Joy N Fun
runners.spotlight: Probably failed to stay 1m last time but he had lost his way over 6f and 7f since winning at Sha Tin in October; opposable at the minute.
runners.comment: He has rather lost his way (6f, 7f, 1m) since winning at Sha Tin in October
runners.owner: Johnny Wong Chun Nam Nancy Wong Et Al

runners.name: Mighty Commander
runners.spotlight: As good as ever since September, winning twice and his latest third over C&D was no backward step; every chance.
runners.comment: Won twice since Sept and his latest third over C&D was no backward step; every chance

runners.name: Masterofmyuniverse
runners.spotlight: Reserve; won four races last season at Sha Tin; this season isn't going particularly well.
runners.comment: Reserve; won four races last season at Sha Tin; this season isn't going particularly well
